description: A Maven project named 'data-processor' has been loaded in IntelliJ IDEA at ~/IdeaProjects/data-processor/. The project compiles and its tests pass, but the pom.xml has three dependency management problems that violate Maven best practices and cause issues in a production build. Identify and fix these issues: change the scope of a test-only dependency from 'compile' to 'test', remove a duplicate library entry while retaining the higher version, and remove a dependency that is not used in the production source code. Ensure the project continues to compile and all tests pass.

metadata.source_attribution: Data processing patterns adapted from Apache Commons / real production patterns
